name: Praemium Limited
analysis: PPS's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.7000, stop A$0.6782, target A$0.7964 (4.41:1) — then trail it.
